design_review.resolution: E3-T2 (Server) deferred to E4; added E3-T1a (CLI JSON) and E3-T5a (Replay CLI) as prerequisites; renamed AstMatchScorer to FunctionCallMatchScorer; fully specified all structs and protocols

phase_name: Agent Evaluation — Phase E Eval Enhancement

phase_e1.scope: Runner加固: Recorder集成, Timeout, 并发, Allowlist, 回归检测
phase_e1.actual_changes: ~350 lines changed across 6 files, 25 integration tests (was 18), 4 new reporter unit tests

phase_e2.scope: 新套件: LlmJudge + provider(10) + memory(12) + e2e(8) + CLI分发
phase_e2.actual_changes: ~367 lines changed in 9 existing files + 3 new suite modules + 8 e2e fixtures, 26 new tests (85 unit + 25 integration = 110 total in octo-eval)

phase_e3.scope: 修订版: CLI JSON输出 + CLI Target + BFCL(10题) + eval.toml + Replay CLI + CI
phase_e3.actual_changes: ~19 new tests (1936 - 1917), CLI subprocess target, BFCL adapter + 10 tasks, eval.toml config, replay CLI, CI workflow YAML

notes: Phase E COMPLETE. All 18 tasks across E1/E2/E3 finished. 1936 tests passing (was 1917 at E2, 1870 baseline). E3 design review found 28 gaps, all resolved. Server mode deferred to E4.
